intro: Over the 17-day period from April 12 to April 28, 2026, ZCyberNews covered 71 supply-chain articles, with a severity mix of 12 medium, 11 critical, 43 high, and 4 informational reports. Key threat actors Lazarus Group, CanisterSprawl, and TeamPCP were observed targeting technology, software development, cryptocurrency, logistics, and manufacturing sectors globally, with specific activity in Asia, Europe, North America, and the Arctic. Notable vulnerabilities include CVE-2026-1731 (CVSS 9.8), CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3), CVE-2026-40176, and CVE-2026-40177.
